diffCoverage.notes: Reviewed the webview-visible state, cloud helper sentinel, Tauri cloud command token storage boundary, and the package/style font-only presentation diff. The new localStorage value is a non-secret linked-device marker only. Also reviewed src-tauri/src/command/cloud.rs because it is part of the current command-layer diff covered by the completion gate.

findings.evidence: The UI stores only zca.cloud.deviceLinked=1 plus the cloud base URL. It never stores the SaaS device token; fresh verify still receives the __keychain__ sentinel after Tauri stores the real token in Keychain.

summary: Security pass: automatic keychain access was removed from startup/login-gate initialization, token storage remains keychain-backed, the webview gains only a non-secret linked-device marker, and the package/style diff is font-only UI presentation.
